description: Test vectors for TaskRevokeBody (body.type = task.revoke) (AMP v0.1.5). Covers cascade, revoke_children, both flags, minimal fields, and invalid payloads.

vectors.description: Revoke with cascade=true — follows delegation chains

body.reason: Data source became unavailable during pipeline run

vectors.note: cascade=true revokes all sub-delegated tasks in the delegation chain. Spawned children are unaffected.

vectors.description: Revoke with cascade=false, revoke_children=true — follows spawn relationships

body.reason: Requirements changed, spawned work is no longer needed

vectors.note: revoke_children=true revokes all tasks spawned via task.spawn. Delegation chain is not followed.

vectors.description: Revoke with both flags true — full cancellation

body.reason: Entire operation cancelled by upstream coordinator

vectors.note: Both flags are independent. When both are true, all delegated and all spawned tasks are revoked.

vectors.description: Minimal — required fields only, both flags default to false
vectors.note: cascade and revoke_children both default to false. Only the target task is revoked.

vectors.description: Revoke with both flags explicitly false — same as minimal

body.reason: Timeout exceeded, revoking this task only

vectors.note: Shows the TaskRevokeBody inside a full AgentMessage envelope with Priority header.
